title: Pursegloveia ashtonii
taxonomy: Pursegloveia ashtonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the genus Pursegloveia, which is a small group of plants. The classification of Pursegloveia ashtonii is within the broader classification of angiosperms, or flowering plants. The plant is further categorized as a dicotyledon, meaning it has two cotyledons or seed leaves in its seedling stage. Its classification is also within the class Magnoliopsida, which includes a large variety of flowering plants.
